parameters.jsonBody: ={"api_key":"$env.TAVILY_API_KEY","query":"DoD Defense Pricing Contracting DPC procurement forecast FY2026 FY2027 planned acquisitions","search_depth":"advanced","max_results":10,"include_raw_content":true}

parameters.query: INSERT INTO gda_opportunity_tracker (opp_title, agency, dept, naics_code, set_aside, estimated_value, data_source, source_url, stage, ai_analysis, gda_score, gda_label, last_refreshed, solicitation_number) VALUES ('{{ ($json.program_name || "").replace(/'/g, "''").substring(0,500) }}', '{{ ($json.agency || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}', '{{ ($json.agency || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}', '{{ $json.naics_code || "" }}', '{{ ($json.set_aside || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}', 0, 'DPC Forecast', '{{ $json.source_url || "" }}', 'Forecast', '{{ ($json.description || "").replace(/'/g, "''").substring(0,1000) + " | Est Value: " + ($json.estimated_value || "TBD") + " | Est RFP: " + ($json.expected_rfp_date || "TBD") }}', 30, 'MONITOR', NOW(), '{{ "DPC-" + ($json.program_name || "unknown").replace(/[^a-zA-Z0-9]/g, "-").substring(0,80) }}') ON CONFLICT (solicitation_number) DO UPDATE SET ai_analysis = EXCLUDED.ai_analysis, last_refreshed = NOW()
